title: The LeatherCap Vanilla+ Pack
description: An in-depth vanilla+ modpack including shaders and resource packs.
body:
A collection of many client-side vanilla+ mods ranging from optimisation and stability improvements, to things that make Minecraft feel more like a modern game.

Designed to be used on any vanilla server with no issues, thanks to only featuring client-side mods!

Used for the LeatherCap YT channel.
